projects.title: Sentiment Detection via Vision
projects.summary: Enhanced sentiment detection by analyzing pixel-level contributions and guiding CNN training to focus on facial regions.
projects.details: Developed attention mechanisms to improve CNN focus on crucial facial areas, achieving better accuracy on sentiment classification tasks.

projects.title: Predictive Modeling with Neural Networks
projects.summary: Built predictive models for purchase prediction, delay forecasting, and demand estimation in restaurants.
projects.details: Achieved top performance in multiple data science competitions using advanced deep learning and regression techniques. Models deployed for business intelligence.

projects.title: Multi-Task Mobile Robot
projects.summary: Designed and built a robot capable of maze solving, object manipulation, and sorting by vision.
projects.details: Integrated perception, planning, and control systems. Used computer vision for real-time shape and color recognition with autonomous navigation.
